# GlobeVortex
> GlobeVortex (globevortex.com) is a bilingual FR/EN AI-powered international news aggregator. It collects and summarizes breaking news from 80+ RSS sources worldwide, covering World, Politics, Economy, Science & Tech, Climate, Conflicts, Health, Culture, and Sports. Articles are scored by importance (0-100) using Claude AI (Anthropic). Top Stories are the highest-importance articles of the last 24 hours.

## What GlobeVortex does
- Aggregates news from 80+ international RSS sources (BBC, CNN, RFI, Le Figaro, franceinfo, Radio-Canada, Sky Sports, and more)
- Publishes bilingual content in French and English
- Uses Claude Haiku AI (Anthropic) to classify, summarize, and score each article by importance
- Updates every 15 minutes via automated cron jobs
- Displays Top Stories (importance score >= 60) and category-filtered news

## Pages
- / : Home page with Top Stories and all news categories
- /about : About GlobeVortex, how it works, technology stack
- /article/[id] : Individual article pages with full metadata and link to original source

## Categories
World, Politics, Economy, Science & Tech, Climate, Conflicts, Health, Culture, Sports

## Technology
- Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- AI: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Anthropic) for classification, summarization and importance scoring
- Deployed on Vercel
- Cron: GitHub Actions every 15 minutes

## Contact
admin@globevortex.com
